message:
feat(diagnostics): add preflight doctor command for fail-closed readiness assessment

Implement a new `runtime_diagnostics doctor` subcommand that combines
runtime diagnostics, evidence export, and support bundle collection into
a single deterministic preflight readiness verdict with reproducible
remediation guidance.

Core types and logic (runtime_diagnostics_cli.rs — +374 lines):
- Add PreflightVerdict enum (Green/Yellow/Red) with as_str/Display and
  serde support for operator-facing traffic-light readiness signals
- Add PreflightBlocker struct capturing blocker_id, severity, rationale,
  remediation guidance, reproducible_command, and evidence_links for
  each readiness failure
- Add PreflightMandatoryFieldStatus for fail-closed mandatory-field
  validation (valid flag, missing_fields, inconsistent_fields lists)
- Add PreflightDoctorOutput combining verdict, blockers, mandatory field
  status, full diagnostics, evidence summary, support bundle, and
  structured logs into one deterministic output
- Implement run_preflight_doctor() which orchestrates diagnostics
  collection, evidence export, support bundle generation, and mandatory
  field validation, then synthesizes blockers from: mandatory field
  contract violations, GC over-budget extensions, scheduler lane
  timeouts, and evidence gaps
- Implement validate_preflight_mandatory_fields() checking trace_id,
  decision_id, policy_id consistency across all three outputs
- Implement render_preflight_summary() for human-readable console output
  including verdict, blocker count, mandatory field status, and
  individual blocker details with reproducible commands

Binary CLI (runtime_diagnostics.rs — +138 lines):
- Add run_doctor() subcommand handler with full flag parsing (--input,
  --summary, --out-dir, --extension-id, --trace-id, --start-ns,
  --end-ns, --severity, --decision-type, --redact-key)
- When --out-dir is provided, writes support bundle files and
  preflight_report.json for artifact consumption
- Update usage() help text with doctor command documentation

Tests:
- Add CLI test: doctor_command_outputs_preflight_json_and_summary
  verifying both JSON and --summary output modes produce valid output
  with expected verdict and blocker structure
- Add CLI test: doctor_command_writes_preflight_report_to_out_dir
  verifying file output mode creates preflight_report.json
- Add integration tests: preflight_doctor_red_for_critical_signals,
  preflight_doctor_mandatory_field_status_checks,
  preflight_doctor_logs_contain_structured_events,
  preflight_doctor_render_summary_includes_verdict verifying verdict
  synthesis, mandatory field validation, structured logging, and
  summary rendering

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
